title: deAO Set of 12 Pull Back Airplanes, Aeroplane Toys, Helicopter Toy, Playset Includes Helicopters, Stealth Bombers, Fighter Jets, Aircraft, Planes, Role-Play Aircraft Models, Birthday Gift for Kids
features: AIRCRAFT FUN: Let your child’s imagination run wild with this great aircraft variety playset! This will be a great add-on to your child’s toy collection.

FEATURES: A variety pack great for children! This set includes jets, fighter planes, helicopters, gliders and much more. All vehicles are powered by a simple pull-back motion so there is no need for any battery installation.

BENEFITS: Your child is able to play with this set alone or with a friend or family member; the imaginative play allows them to build their communication skills! They are able to create their own narratives and build their imaginations with this fun variety pack.

GREAT GIFT: This playset is a great gift for a vehicle or plane enthusiast! Encourage your child to develop an understanding of aircrafts and motor vehicles through play. All vehicles are a great miniature size so the child is able to take this set with them anywhere.
RECOMMENDATIONS & WARNINGS: Choking Hazard due to small parts: not suitable for children under the age of 3.To be used under direct supervision of an adult.
